title: SapS4HanaConnection
description: SAP S/4HANA Connection Config for Embedded Analytics

sapS4HanaBasicAuthType.title: Basic Auth
sapS4HanaBasicAuthType.description: Username and password credentials for SAP S/4HANA.

username.title: Username
username.description: Username to authenticate with SAP S/4HANA.

password.title: Password
password.description: Password to authenticate with SAP S/4HANA.

sapS4HanaOAuthType.title: OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials
sapS4HanaOAuthType.description: OAuth 2.0 client credentials for SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

clientId.title: Client ID
clientId.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID registered in SAP.

hostPort.title: Host and Port
hostPort.description: Base URL of the SAP S/4HANA instance (e.g. https://s4hana.example.com).

authType.title: Authentication Type
authType.description: Choose Basic Auth (username/password) for on-premise or OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials for SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

clientNumber.title: Client Number
clientNumber.description: SAP client number (Mandant), typically a 3-digit string (e.g. '100').

verifySSL.title: Verify SSL
verifySSL.description: Client SSL verification. Use 'no-ssl' for plain HTTP, 'ignore' to skip certificate validation, 'validate' to verify against a CA certificate.

sslConfig.title: SSL Config
sslConfig.description: CA certificate, client certificate, and private key for SSL validation. Required when verifySSL is 'validate'.

dashboardFilterPattern.description: Regex to exclude or include dashboards that matches the pattern.
dashboardFilterPattern.title: Default Dashboard Filter Pattern

chartFilterPattern.description: Regex exclude or include charts that matches the pattern.
chartFilterPattern.title: Default Chart Filter Pattern

dataModelFilterPattern.description: Regex exclude or include data models that matches the pattern.
dataModelFilterPattern.title: Default Data Model Filter Pattern
